summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Healthmax Tracking fitness app iteration 2. All backend APIs including new ExerciseDB integration with local fallback are working correctly. Frontend authentication flows and UI elements are properly implemented with correct dark theme and protected route redirects.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns 200
Exercise library endpoint /api/exercises returns local exercise library (43 exercises) with ExerciseDB API fallback working correctly
Exercise search /api/exercises?q=bench returns filtered results (Bench Press, Incline Bench Press)
Exercise muscle group filter /api/exercises?muscle_group=Chest returns 5 chest exercises
Exercise bodyparts endpoint /api/exercises/bodyparts returns 10 body part categories
Auth middleware correctly returns 401 for protected endpoints without token
All protected endpoints (/api/workouts, /api/nutrition/search, /api/goals, /api/social/feed, /api/stats/dashboard, /api/stats/streaks) return 401 without auth
Frontend login page loads with correct UI elements (email, password, Google sign-in)
Email and password input fields present and functional with proper data-testid attributes
Google sign-in button present and properly styled
Create Account toggle functionality works - shows/hides name input field correctly
Protected route redirect works - all routes (/dashboard, /workouts, /nutrition, /goals, /social, /achievements, /profile) redirect to login when accessed without auth
Dark theme (#0f0f10) background color correctly implemented
Red accent color (#FF3B30) correctly implemented on primary buttons
Hero image with gym equipment visible on left side for desktop layout
